title: Is it normal for blood pressure to spike during exercise?
body: I've been checking my blood pressure before and after workouts. Before: 120/80. After 30 minutes of cardio: 160/90. My doctor said my resting BP is fine. Should I be concerned about these spikes during exercise?

title: What's the difference between a panic attack and a heart attack?
body: I've been having episodes of chest tightness, shortness of breath, and racing heart. My ECG came back normal. How can I tell if what I'm experiencing is anxiety-related or cardiac? The symptoms seem identical to me.

title: How long does it take for sleep deprivation to cause serious health problems?
body: I've been sleeping about 5 hours a night for the past 2 years due to work. I feel okay most of the time. At what point does this become dangerous? Are the effects reversible?

title: Can you build muscle while eating a plant-based diet?
body: I've been vegan for 6 months and started lifting weights 3 months ago. My progress has stalled compared to when I was eating meat. Am I getting enough protein from plants? What do I need to change?

title: Is metformin safe to take long-term for type 2 diabetes?
body: I was diagnosed with type 2 diabetes last year and put on metformin. My doctor says it's safe but I've been reading about vitamin B12 depletion and other concerns. What should I know about long-term metformin use?
